content: Phase 3: Item Analysis backend endpoints + frontend UI
Phase 3: UX polish - error handling, deep-linking, question validation
Phase 4: Manual Correction backend - Examiner allocation, round-robin, workload transfer
Phase 4: Manual Correction frontend - Examiner portal, correction UI, transfer tool
Phase 5: Proctoring backend - tab-switch detection, event logging
Phase 5: Proctoring frontend - violation alerts in exam UI
